spec_match.rationale: Superb conceptual match. Walks through six separate draw calls inside a single render pass, applying setImmediateData mock parameters dynamically per draw call, paired with a flawless fallback.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive; handles canvas click coordinate raycasting to select separate shapes and dynamically drives the render/pulsing states via immediate state changes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with feature list description.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellently calculates coordinate hits on mouse clicks, and provides a fully featured Canvas 2D replica displaying identical material highlighting animations.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
